name: parashari-precision
description: Dual-platform Vedic astrology suite — macOS + Web, local-first SQLite

scripts.build: npm -w packages/core run build && npm -w packages/api run build && npm -w packages/web run build
scripts.test: npm -w packages/core run test && npm -w packages/api run test
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npx playwright test
